name: Traditional Friendship Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups chopped Friendship Fruit, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In an electric mixer, combine the oil, sugar, and eggs. Beat until well mixed.
2. Add vanilla and continue beating until the mixture is smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually blend the dry ingredients into the batter.
5. Mix in the chopped nuts and fruit.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt, tube, or 9-by-13 inch pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
